summary: Frontend UI/UX fixes testing - All 3 features verified working. Fixed critical bug with null actual_fee causing modal crash.
passed_tests: Feature 1 (Notification Refresh): Changed Job #8 status from 'Verbal Uploaded' to 'Stones Returned' -> 'Stones Ready' notification appeared immediately without closing modal
Feature 2 (Actual Fee in Stones List): Job #9 stones table shows 'Actual: $450' for RU500J901 (Est. $400) and 'Actual: $800' for SA600J902 (Est. $350)
Feature 2 (Actual Fee in Jobs List): Jobs list shows 'Actual: $1,720' in green text for Job #9 in the Fee column
Feature 3 (Unified Edit Mode - Jobs Page): Stone dialog opens LOCKED with message 'Click Edit to modify fees and verbal findings'
Feature 3 (Unified Edit Mode - Jobs Page): All fields (Certificate ID, Weight, Identification, Color, Origin, Comment, Actual Fee, Color Stability) are disabled by default
Feature 3 (Unified Edit Mode - Jobs Page): Click 'Edit' button enables all editable fields and shows 'Save Changes' button
Feature 3 (Unified Edit Mode - Stones Page): Stone details dialog opens LOCKED with same lock message
Feature 3 (Unified Edit Mode - Stones Page): All fields disabled by default, enabled after clicking 'Edit'
Feature 3 (Unified Edit Mode - Stones Page): Combined save button saves both verbal findings and fee changes

bug_fixed_during_testing.description: TypeError: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'toLocaleString')
bug_fixed_during_testing.root_cause: stones with actual_fee: null passed the check 'actual_fee !== undefined' but crashed when calling .toLocaleString() on null
files_fixed: /app/frontend/src/app/(dashboard)/dashboard/jobs/page.tsx - 6 occurrences changed from '!== undefined' to '!= null'
/app/frontend/src/app/(dashboard)/dashboard/stones/page.tsx - 2 occurrences changed from '!== undefined' to '!= null'

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 UI/UX features are now working. Fixed a critical bug where stones with null actual_fee would crash the job modal. The fix changed null checks from '!== undefined' to '!= null' which properly handles both null and undefined. Frontend was rebuilt to deploy the fix. Job #9 has 4 stones - 2 with different actual fees ($450 vs $400, $800 vs $350) and 2 with null actual_fee (now showing estimated fee correctly). Job #8 was changed to 'Stones Returned' status during testing to verify notification refresh feature.
